name: All Purpose Seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the dehydrated onion in a blender and pulse to break it into finer pieces.
2. Add the remaining herbs to the blender.
3. Pulse the mixture until well combined, but not finely powdered.
4. Store the seasoning blend in an airtight shaker bottle to keep it fresh.
5. Use this versatile seasoning on all cooking and at the table as a salt substitute.
6. Note: This seasoning is also available commercially as "Instead of Salt" All Purpose Herb Seasoning for convenience.
